name: Gloom Stalker Spells
desc: When you reach a Ranger level specified in the Gloom Stalker spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

| Ranger Level | Spells |
| --- | --- |
| 3 | Disguise Self |
| 5 | Rope Trick |
| 9 | Fear |
| 13 | Greater Invisibility |
| 17 | Seeming |
